sentences.arabic: تَنَاوُلُ الْخَضْرَاوَاتِ وَالْفَوَاكِهِ يَوْمِيًّا مُهِمٌّ جِدًّا لِلصِّحَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Svakodnevno konzumiranje povrća i voća je veoma važno za zdravlje.
sentences.translationEn: Eating vegetables and fruits daily is very important for health.

sentences.arabic: تَحْتَوِي هَذِهِ الْأَطْعِمَةُ عَلَى كَثِيرٍ مِنَ الْفِيتَامِينَاتِ وَالْمَعَادِنِ.
sentences.translation: Ove namirnice sadrže mnogo vitamina i minerala.
sentences.translationEn: These foods contain many vitamins and minerals.

sentences.arabic: أُفَضِّلُ شُرْبَ عَصِيرِ الْبُرْتُقَالِ الطَّازَجِ بَدَلًا مِنَ الْمَشْرُوبَاتِ السُّكَّرِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Više volim piti svježi sok od narandže umjesto slatkih pića.
sentences.translationEn: I prefer to drink fresh orange juice instead of sugary drinks.
